title: mentha arvensis f. pulegiformis
intro: Mentha arvensis f. pulegiformis, also known as American pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the mint plant that is native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of American pennyroyal include its use in treating menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and insect repellent, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. American pennyroyal can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
